description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with multiple interconnected rectangular sections, each topped with a pitched, terracotta-tiled roof. The exterior walls are primarily a mix of white and dark brown, with some sections clad in wood paneling, giving the structure a warm, inviting appearance. Large windows and several doors are distributed asymmetrically around the building, providing ample natural light and access points. The house is surrounded by a green lawn, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small covered porch with a gabled roof. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and Mediterranean influences, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor-indoor connectivity. The structure appears solid and robust, with clear delineation between private and communal spaces.
description: A single-story house with terracotta-tiled pitched roofs, white and brown exterior walls, and a mix of wood paneling, surrounded by a green lawn. The design features multiple sections, large windows, and a prominent covered entry porch.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rear and side of the house, showing the dark brown exterior walls, multiple roof sections, and a glimpse of the green lawn.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entryway with a covered porch, white walls, and several windows, emphasizing the welcoming facade and architectural symmetry.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the wood-paneled sections, additional windows, and the continuity of the terracotta-tiled roofs, with the white perimeter wall enclosing the property.
description_view_3: The opposite rear view shows more dark brown walls, a secondary entrance, and the segmented roof structure, with less emphasis on windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a gabled roof, single main door, and steps leading up, accented by wood paneling and a small overhang.
